subcodes.first_line: This is the Book from Him Who is imprisoned, unto him who believed in the Spirit in His days and was quickened through His Most Great Word that [3.5s]... ...God hath prescribed unto everyone the duty of teaching His Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی الذی آمن بالروح فی ایامه و حی بکلمه الاعظم التی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power of prayer
